name: Industrial Skill Compiler and Evaluator
objective: Define a consistent trigger, permission, data-flow, threat, evaluation, fixture, rollback, and promotion-readiness evidence package for future candidate Skills.
non_goals: No automatic Skill modification, trigger editing, installation, update, execution, or promotion.
inputs: Future customer-approved candidate description and exact approved target paths.
outputs: Future trigger-contract, permission-contract, data-flow, threat-model, eval-plan, fixtures, baseline plan, rollback plan, and promotion readiness review.

read: Future customer-approved candidate description and exact approved target paths

excluded_patterns: Traceability, PR narration, issue handling, release notes, and documentation require the separate candidate pipeline.
known_gaps: The proposal is locked and does not compile, modify, or evaluate a Skill.
